specs.title: cp-000: Chat messages are local component state only and are not reloaded on page refres
cp-001: submitAiPrompt switches to the Chat tab pre-fills the prompt then programmatical
cp-002: Slash-command action ask switches to the Chat tab and focuses the chat input wit
cp-003: Slash-command action find-sources opens the external Research Sidebar and seeds
cp-004: Slash-command action integrity-check only switches the right panel to the Checks
cp-005: Editor action show-word-count posts an assistant chat message with per-section c
cp-006: Editor action add-comment opens the Comment Sidebar if needed and dispatches sch
cp-007: Comment Sidebar replaces the normal AI panel only when commentSidebarOpen is tru
cp-008: Reference Sidebar takes precedence over the Comment Sidebar when sidebarOpen is
cp-009: Right-panel tabs are hidden while the Reference Sidebar or Comment Sidebar is ta
cp-010: CmdShiftR toggles the Reference Sidebar from anywhere in the page
cp-011: CmdShiftC in the editor dispatches scholarsynceditor-action with action insert-c
cp-012: Citation dialog opening stores the current editor selection in citationSelection
cp-013: Inserted citations restore the saved selection before inserting the citation nod
cp-014: Inserted citation nodes receive only referenceIds in their attrs payload
cp-015: After citation insertion the page ensures a bibliography node exists at the end
cp-016: Citation-insert success notice reads Citation inserted for one reference
cp-017: Citation-insert success notice reads N citations inserted for multiple reference
cp-018: Citation success notice auto-clears after 25 seconds
cp-019: Citation notice timer is cleared on unmount
cp-020: scholarsyncinsert-citation events from Research create a synthetic reference ID
cp-021: Research-generated citations are inserted directly into the editor after being a
cp-022: Export dropdown opens and closes from the showExport local state only
cp-023: Export dropdown does not implement outside-click dismissal in the current page c
cp-024: Clicking any export option closes the dropdown before making the export request
cp-025: PDF export posts title content to apiexportpdf
cp-026: Successful PDF export opens a new browser window and writes returned HTML into i
cp-027: PDF export is a no-op when ProseMirror content is empty
cp-028: PDF export failures log PDF export failed to the console with no inline error
cp-029: Word export posts title content to apiexportdocx
cp-030: Word export filename is sanitized from docTitle by replacing non-alphanumeric ch
cp-031: Word export currently downloads with a doc extension not docx
cp-032: Word export is a no-op when ProseMirror content is empty
cp-033: Word export failures log DOCX export failed to the console with no inline error
cp-034: Research tab in the right panel is a launcher not an embedded search-results UI
